posts.message:
🍗 Chicken Count Check – Meat Birds Edition! 🐔🔥
👀 How many MEAT BIRDS do we currently have at Roswell Family Farm?!
These guys are growing FAST and keeping us BUSY! Between feeding time and watching them bulk up… it’s safe to say there are quite a few out there 👀
Think you know the number? 🤔
Drop your guess below ⬇️
🏆 Closest guess wins bragging rights (and maybe a little surprise 😉)
#RoswellFamilyFarm #MeatBirds #ChickenCount #FarmLife #GuessingGame

🥚🐔🦆🪿 What’s the difference in our farm fresh eggs?

At Roswell Family Farm, not all eggs are created equal—and that’s a GOOD thing 👇
🐔 Chicken Eggs
Your everyday favorite! Mild flavor, perfect for frying, scrambling, and all your go-to meals.
🦆 Duck Eggs
Bigger, richer, and packed with flavor. These are AMAZING for baking—think fluffier cakes and creamier dishes! One egg can equal 2 chicken eggs!
🪿 Goose Eggs
The giant of them all! One egg can equal 3 chicken eggs!! Rich, hearty, and perfect for big breakfasts or sharing.

✨ Whether you’re cooking, baking, or just want to try something new—we’ve got the perfect egg for you.

📩 Message us to grab yours or ask what’s available this week!

Fresh flock update from Roswell Family Farm 🦆

We just added 34 new ducks today, bringing our total to 56.

Some are drakes, but even with that, our egg production has already doubled. These ducks must be on a different frequency, because the results have been truly out of this world.

More fresh duck eggs are on the way from our little corner of Dolgeville/Salisbury, NY, and the signal from Area 51 is coming through loud and clear. 🛸

Thanks for following along and for supporting everything we do here on the farm — from duck eggs, chicken, pork, turkey, and beef to all of our meat boxes. We’re grateful for every order and every bit of support you send our way.

#RoswellFamilyFarm #DuckEggs #FarmLife #OutOfThisWorld #Area51 #MohawkValley #UpstateNY #SupportLocal
